category_title: Students internalizing failure from negative teacher feedback
scenario_title: Struggling with an English paper and seeking help
minimal_context: The student is working on an English paper using a binder of materials for the year.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your binder and continue working on your English paper.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I was working on a paper and I couldn’t—I didn’t get it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to review the instructions again and see what you can do.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm trying to talk to you that I didn't get it, to help me out.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to figure it out yourself. If you just stop trying, you're going to fail anyways.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Closes the binder) Fine, then I'm just a failure. I'm completely soured on this class and I'm leaving.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open your binder and continue working on your English paper.

STUDENT: I was working on a paper and I couldn’t—I didn’t get it.

TUTOR: Try to review the instructions again and see what you can do.

STUDENT: I'm trying to talk to you that I didn't get it, to help me out.

TUTOR: You need to figure it out yourself. If you just stop trying, you're going to fail anyways.

STUDENT: (Closes the binder) Fine, then I'm just a failure. I'm completely soured on this class and I'm leaving.

context.materials: Materials for the entire year in a binder

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When working on a paper and realizing he 'didn't get it'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Trying to talk to the teacher to explain that he didn't get it, asking to 'help me out'
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Feeling completely soured on the teacher and her class if discouraged
related_quotes: And see, I was working on a paper and I couldn’t—I didn’t get it. And I was trying to talk to her that I didn’t get it, to help me out.

behavior_patterns.condition: When receiving overtly negative feedback suggesting effort is futile and failure is inevitable
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Left school for a period of time following this incident
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Took on this persona of a failure; played into his self-concept as a learner
